name: Mushroom Parmesan
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Wash and remove mushroom stems. Chop the stems and mix with garlic, parsley, cheese, oregano, bread crumbs, salt, and pepper.
Place mushrooms stem side up in a baking dish. Fill mushrooms with mixture. Add 1/4-inch of water to dish. Pour olive oil evenly over caps and bake for 30 minutes.
